zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN於1177年出生在法國布格o-達蒙吉賽吉讓安時，他的父親Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN37歲，母親Elisabeth DE VERGY37歲。他去世於大約1231年3月31日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福可勒爾蒙特享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN于1177年出生在法国布格o-達蒙吉賽吉讓安时，他的父亲Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN37岁，母亲Elisabeth DE VERGY37岁。他去世于大约1231年3月31日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福可勒爾蒙特享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN was born in 1177, in Mont-Saint-Jean, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN, was 37 and his mother, Elisabeth DE VERGY, was 37. He died about 31 March 1231, in Clermont, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN est né en 1177, à Mont-Saint-Jean, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth DE VERGY, avait 37 ans. Il est décédé environ 31 mars 1231, à Clermont, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN 1177 in Mont-Saint-Jean, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN 37 und seine Mutter Elisabeth DE VERGY 37. Er starb um 31. März 1231 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Clermont, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN è nato il nel 1177 nel Mont-Saint-Jean, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth DE VERGY, aveva 37 anni. Morì circa 31 marzo 1231, nel Clermont, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEANが1177年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルモント-サイント-ジェアンで生まれた時，父Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEANは37歳，母Elisabeth DE VERGYは37歳であった。彼は約1231年3月31日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイクラーモントで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN(이)가 1177년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 몽-세인트-j이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth DE VERGY(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1231년 3월 31일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 클레몽에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN nasceu em 1177, em Mont-Saint-Jean, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth DE VERGY, tinha 37 anos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 31 de março de 1231, em Clermont, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN родился в 1177 г. в местности монт-сеинт-джин, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth DE VERGY, 37. Он умер около 31 марта 1231 г. в местности клирмонт, хауте-савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume II DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN nació en 1177, en Mont-Saint-Jean, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Hugues DE MONT-SAINT-JEAN, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elisabeth DE VERGY, tenía 37 años. Murió aproximadamente 31 de marzo de 1231, en Clermont, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
